_about: Varrock town ontology instance — hand-authored GOLD-STANDARD pilot for the entity graph. See data/map/ontology-template-guide.md. Pattern: copy a record, change the values. Zaff's shop below is the fully-worked example (incl. the diary-gated conditional offers); everything marked _TODO is yours to flesh out.
